caveats: Same-data recovery is not a superiority claim; the planted-GT robustness upgrade is not complete.
claim_scope: Preliminary recovery evidence: coordinate-only point-pattern scores recover the segmentation-based shared metric on the same molecule table, while A-level planted-GT robustness is still under review.

provenance.note: isolated shared-metric and planted-GT checkpoint runs
